Container.Name: reminders-cron
Container.Overview: Ofelia cron sidecar. Reads schedule labels on the reminders-app container via the Docker socket and fires the goal-reminder and weekly-digest endpoints on cron. No config required if reminders-app is already running.
Container.Requires: The reminders-app and reminders-postgres containers must be running first. This container reads schedule labels from reminders-app via the Docker socket, so it only needs to be installed once and left running.
Container.Description:
Cron sidecar for the Accountability app.
Ofelia uses the Docker socket to read labels on the reminders-app container, then exec's curl inside that container to fire reminders every 15 minutes and the weekly digest every Sunday at 18:00 (in APP_TIMEZONE).
**You usually don't need to change any settings here.** The schedules live on the reminders-app container's labels, not on this one. To change schedules, edit the labels on reminders-app and restart it.
The Docker socket is mounted read-only — Ofelia only reads container metadata; it cannot start, stop, or modify containers.

Config.Name: Docker socket
Config.Description: Read-only Docker socket. Required so Ofelia can find containers by label and exec into them.

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone for cron schedules. Match this to the reminders-app container's APP_TIMEZONE so '0 0 18 * * 0' means 18:00 in your local time.
